title: Agentic AI Platform For Configurable Deployment And Orchestration Of Enterprise AI Workforce
description: The embodiments herein provide a modular and scalable agentic AI-based platform configured for autonomous execution of enterprise workflows.

title: Document-Centric Orchestration and Deterministic Execution of Multi-Language Computational Workflows
description: The present disclosure provides systems and methods for executing, orchestrating, and materializing computational workflows using document-based representations.
